历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science/physics category were approximately 7465 → 7211 → 9409 → 12146 → 11835. Rankings were relatively high in 2021–2022 (around 7200–7500), but shifted significantly backward from 2023 onwards to above 9400, further to 12146 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 11835 in 2025. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 4400 positions, showing an overall fluctuating backward trend, with a baseline of approximately 11835 in 2025. The enrollment plan for physics category in Yunnan Province was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 16 in 2024, and further to 22 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 22, unchanged from 2025, indicating no further expansion, so competitive pressure has not been alleviated by plan changes.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it ranked 47th in 2021 → 61st in 2022 → 58th in 2023 → 52nd in 2024 → 58th in 2025 → 58th in 2026, stable in the 50–60 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level nationally. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'significantly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (the vice dean of the School of Environment having an extramarital affair and being dismissed, and the mistaken display of the Rising Sun Flag incident). Negative public opinion may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 69th (comprehensive popularity 445133), evaluated as 'average', with short video exposure at a medium-low level. No significant admission gaps in the past 5 years. Disciplines: Education A, Marxist Theory A, Geography A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literatures A-, totaling 5 A-/A/A-level disciplines. Teacher-training disciplines are outstanding, highly matching the enrollment majors (Physics Teacher Training, Biology Teacher Training, Geography Science, etc.).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, which has some cross-provincial appeal to candidates from southwestern provinces. The proportion of enrollment in Yunnan Province is about 2.2%–2.6% (66 out of 2492 in 2024), at a medium-low level, not a major source province. The popularity of teacher-training/education majors turned from 'significantly heating up' in 2022 to 'divergent wait-and-see' in 2023–2024, with social evaluation becoming more rational. Computer science, electronic information/communication remain highly recommended, but the university's physics category enrollment mainly focuses on teacher-training and basic disciplines, not popular engineering fields. The total number of candidates in Yunnan Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (physics category 173,282 + history category 112,406 = 285,688). The estimated physics category is about 229,000, leading to intensified competition. 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, the significant increase of about 32% in Yunnan candidates leading to intensified competition, and the negative reputation incidents that may suppress application enthusiasm, based on the 2025 baseline of 11835, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 12035, with a range of 11535–12535.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Biology Science (Teacher Training)
- Physics (Teacher Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Synthetic Biology
- Geography Science (Geography Science Innovation Experimental Class, Physical Geography and Resource Environment, Human Geography and Urban-Rural Planning).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Emergency Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11535–12535, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 flagship majors (Geography Science Teacher Training, Biology Science Teacher Training) as a sprint, and Tier 3 Emergency Management as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 11535), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 teacher-training majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 1782, and in 2025, the minimum ranking for history category was approximately 3053, with a drop of about 1271 places over two years, a significant decline; the baseline for 2025 is about 3053; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province for liberal arts/history category was 2 students in 2024, expanded to 10 students in 2025; the plan for 2026 is reduced to 6 students, a 40% reduction compared to 2025, leading to significant changes in competition structure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 58th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, stable in the 50-60 range in recent years; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is 'clearly negative', mainly involving teacher ethics incidents, which may reduce some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 69th, rated as 'average'; no significant admission cutoff gaps in the past 5 years; Education rated A, Marxist Theory A, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Foreign Languages and Literature A-, highly matching the history category majors (History Education, Primary Education, Preschool Education, Applied Psychology), with outstanding strength in teacher training disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher training/education majors 'significantly warmed' in 2022, then turned to 'divergence and wait-and-see' in 2023-2024; majors like History, Primary Education, and Preschool Education have stable social demand but divergent competition; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Yunnan college entrance examination is 377,900, with an estimated 148,500 in the history category, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (112,406), significantly intensifying competition; Nanjing Normal University is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, an eastern developed region, offering some cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates from southwestern provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 3053, the 40% reduction in enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 32% in history category candidates in Yunnan intensifying competition, and negative reputation factors; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2400, with a range of 1968-2832.
